_comment: Region -> species mapping for DevMon's Phase B2 travel system (devmon travel). This file is PURE DATA in Phase B1 — no code loads it yet. Each region has a name, description, an approximate level_band [min, max] used as a design guideline for spawn/level tuning in a later phase, a display 'order', and the list of creature ids (matching src/devmon/data/creatures/{id}.json) that belong to it. Every creature in the roster belongs to exactly one region. level_band is aspirational/loose for the 27 pre-Phase-B1 species (their creature.level_range predates the region system); it is authoritative for all Phase-B1-and-later species.

termina_meadows.name: Termina Meadows
termina_meadows.description: Rolling starter fields where every developer's journey begins. Low-stakes, high-grass-touching.

compiler_wastes.name: Compiler Wastes
compiler_wastes.description: A cracked, industrial badland of overheating build servers and rusted-out toolchains.

cloud_reaches.name: Cloud Reaches
cloud_reaches.description: Windswept altitude where availability zones drift like weather fronts. Sky, storm, and static.

kernel_depths.name: Kernel Depths
kernel_depths.description: Below user-space, below the OS itself — a dark, cave-like substrate of raw memory and metal.

voidnet.name: The Voidnet
voidnet.description: The eldritch endgame beyond the edge of the routing table. Legendaries roam here, mostly undocumented.
